name: Jani Music Bot
description: A powerful Telegram Music Bot with Spotify, YouTube, SoundCloud & more support. Deploy in one click!

API_ID.description: Your Telegram API ID. Get it from https://my.telegram.org

API_HASH.description: Your Telegram API Hash. Get it from https://my.telegram.org

BOT_TOKEN.description: Your Telegram Bot Token. Get it from @BotFather

MONGO_DB_URI.description: Your MongoDB connection URI. Get it from https://cloud.mongodb.com

LOGGER_ID.description: Telegram Channel/Group ID where bot will send logs (e.g. -1001234567890)

STRING_SESSION.description: Pyrogram String Session for the assistant account. Generate using @StringFatherBot

BOT_NAME.description: Display name of your bot (e.g. Jani Music)

SUPPORT_CHANNEL.description: Support channel link (must start with https://)

SUPPORT_CHAT.description: Support chat group link (must start with https://)

HEROKU_APP_NAME.description: Your Heroku app name (for auto-restart feature)

HEROKU_API_KEY.description: Your Heroku API Key (for auto-restart feature). Get from https://dashboard.heroku.com/account

GIT_TOKEN.description: GitHub Personal Access Token (for upstream update feature, optional)

UPSTREAM_REPO.description: Upstream GitHub repo URL for auto-updates

SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID.description: Spotify API Client ID (optional, has default)

SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Spotify API Client Secret (optional, has default)

PLAYLIST_FETCH_LIMIT.description: Maximum songs to fetch from a playlist

AUTO_LEAVING_ASSISTANT.description: Auto leave assistant from empty voice chats (True/False)

ASSISTANT_LEAVE_TIME.description: Time in seconds before assistant auto-leaves
